description_long: This is a compact, two-story copy shop or print shop with a modern, utilitarian design, featuring a flat roof and a mix of beige and muted red exterior walls. The ground floor has large, frosted windows and a prominent entryway, with a small overhang and a set of stairs leading to a secondary door on the upper level. The building is adorned with various small details such as air conditioning units, pipes, vents, and scattered trash bins, giving it an urban, lived-in feel. There are several blue and red bottles or cans placed around the exterior, adding to the sense of daily activity. The shop is situated on a concrete base, with a sidewalk-like perimeter, and signage with icons indicating services is mounted on the corner. The overall appearance suggests a functional, service-oriented business in a bustling city neighborhood.
description: A two-story, modern copy shop with beige and red walls, large frosted windows, urban details, and corner signage, set on a concrete base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large frosted windows, corner signage, and street-level details like bins and bottles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the external staircase to the upper door, wall vents, pipes, and additional signage and bins.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal features, showing the plain back wall, rooftop units, and the continuation of the staircase.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the corner signage, uninterrupted wall surfaces, and rooftop details.
attribute_signage: There is a vertical sign on the front right corner with three icons: a printer, a sheet of paper, and a martini glass, all in white on a blue and pink background. No text or branding is visible.
attribute_posters_or_sample_prints_displ: There are several small papers and notes attached to the wall near the side door and on the wall under the stairs, but no large posters or sample prints are visible.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern utilitarian with flat roof, simple geometric forms, exposed utility elements, and minimal decorative features.
